stemHtml: An aircraft wants to fly from Europe to USA via Nat HLA track D, entry point PIKIL, and the track is a PBCS track with reduced lateral separation. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The aircraft must meet increased RVSM separation, in addition to increased navigation accuracy.
options.b: The commander must consider that the aircraft will be more affected by wake turbulence of the preceding aircraft, since they fly closer to each other.
options.c: The aircraft must meet additional requirements on CPDLC and ADS-C, particularly regarding the time of response to any requests.
options.d: The aircraft must have the required PBN for the route being flown, and have 3 working LRNS for redundancy.
